description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, reminiscent of classic Les Paul models. The body features a dark, glossy finish with visible wood grain and gold hardware, including control knobs and bridge components. The neck is long and slender, with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard and metallic frets. The headstock is angled and fitted with six tuning pegs, arranged three on each side, and appears to have a subtle decorative element. The back of the guitar is smooth and unadorned, matching the dark finish of the front. The overall construction suggests a high-quality instrument suitable for urban street performances or music venues.
description: A dark, glossy electric guitar with gold hardware, single cutaway body, and a classic headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the guitar's dark wood grain finish, gold hardware, control knobs, and the full fretboard.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body depth and the protruding bridge and tuning pegs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back of the guitar and the headstock from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile emphasizing the thinness of the body and the curvature of the top and back.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six tuning pegs, three per side, no visible logo, classic Les Paul style
